hero.title: Train With Purpose. Grow In Character. Rise Together.
hero.copy: Utah Flight is built for athletes who want disciplined training, fast development, and a club culture that feels intense, positive, and united.

ribbon: Editable for camps, teams, and tournaments
Built to swap in your own media fast

about.title: A sharp, modern club site with a bold sports look inspired by elite volleyball branding.
about.copy: This first version uses the public Utah Flight Facebook logo reference and the page description as a starting point. Update the sections with your exact training model, coaches, venues, sponsors, and registration details whenever you're ready.
about.quote: Utah Flight Volleyball Club is a competitive boys volleyball club for middle school and high school aged athletes.

programs.title: Middle School Development
programs.copy: Use this card for younger training groups, skill academies, or pre-club sessions focused on fundamentals, confidence, and movement quality.

programs.title: High School Club Teams
programs.copy: Highlight your main club teams here with season expectations, practice structure, travel level, and what athletes can expect from the environment.

programs.title: Camps And Clinics
programs.copy: Feature short-format training events, summer clinics, positional sessions, or open gyms with quick signup links and rotating announcements.

recruiting.title: Designed To Make Your Brand Feel Serious
recruiting.copy: The layout uses a strong hero, high-contrast sections, oversized type, and athletic motion cues to echo the confident club style you referenced while staying original and easy to maintain.
points: Swap the logo by replacing one image file path.
